reference: It is unlikely to be Parkinson's disease. Most neurodegenerative disorders are characterized by a loss of smell, not alterations in smell. There are many things that can cause alterations in smell. If it concerns you, then you should get it checked out.
text: It is unlikely to be Parkinson's disease. Most neurodegenerative disorders are characterized by a loss of smell, not alterations in smell. There are many things that can cause alterations in smell. If it concerns you, then you should get it checked out.
